positive: A detailed, highly stylized geometric forest scene rendered in black and white linocut style, forming a striking silhouette. The main subject is a dense array of stylized tropical leaves, exotic flora, and abstract mountain peaks, arranged in a circular, continuous pattern suitable for repeat textile printing. The composition must be highly symmetrical and balanced, featuring strong contrasts between solid black shapes and negative white space. Use a vintage, engraved illustration aesthetic, with crisp, clean lines and cross-hatching techniques for depth, maximizing print readability and commercial appeal. Focus on clean, scalable elements.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, border, frame, copyright, messy, fuzzy, blur, noise, grayscale, cartoon, watercolor, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail
